name: Contact details
pageTitle: Contact details - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
heading: Contact details
bodyCopy: These are the details we have for you. Make sure they are up to date.
We will use these details if your consignment is chosen for inspection.

structure.govukComponent: Fieldset (legend as page heading, govuk-fieldset__legend--xl wrapping an h1.govuk-fieldset__heading)

structure.text: These are the details we have for you. Make sure they are up to date. / We will use these details if your consignment is chosen for inspection.
structure.govukComponent: Hint (two paragraphs inside a single govuk-hint)

structure.text: Organisation address (with a 'Change' link — variant-only, seen only when the page is reached via the review/amend flow; not rendered in the happy-path IUU create trace)
structure.govukComponent: Table or summary list (#review-table-organisation-address) — INFERRED from page object, not observed in trace
Button (primary submit) — INFERRED variant. Replaces 'Save and continue' when the page is entered from the review screen (amend / change-answer flow); not observed in the create-journey trace.

govukComponents.usage: Wraps the three contact fields; its legend is the page H1 (Contact details), following the GOV.UK 'legend as page heading' pattern
Name, Email address and Mobile number inputs (pre-populated with the signed-in user's details)
Field labels: Name, Email address, Mobile number
Two-paragraph explanatory text under the heading (fieldset-level hint)

'Save and return to hub' and 'Save and continue' submit buttons (both styled as primary buttons, distinguished only by name/value). In the amend/review flow the primary button is instead labelled 'Save and review' (variant, inferred from page object)
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d, action 152; variant 'Save and review' from page-objects/notification/ContactDetailsPage.ts:14

govukComponents.usage: 'Cancel and return to hub' link inside a govuk-body paragraph

Organisation-address review table (#review-table-organisation-address) carrying a 'Change' link. Variant-only — only rendered when the page is reached via the review/amend flow; never observed in the happy-path IUU create trace. INFERRED from page object; exact component (table vs summary list) unconfirmed.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d, action 152 (input id/name="name", type="text", autocomplete="name"). Note: the QA tests never fill this field — every ched-p workflow/accessibility path clicks straight through with btnSaveAndContinue accepting the pre-populated account value (ched-p-workflows.ts:520,792,1000; ched-p-accessibility-tests.spec.ts:242). No test exercises or asserts a required/format rule on this field, so required=false reflects the DOM only and server-side rules remain unverified.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d, action 152 (input id/name="email", type="email", autocomplete="email", spellcheck="false"). QA tests never fill or assert this field (accepted pre-populated, ched-p-workflows.ts:520,792,1000). No email-format validation exercised in trace or test — remains a gap.

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: Mobile number
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d, action 152 (input id/name="telephone", type="tel", autocomplete="tel"). QA tests never fill or assert this field (accepted pre-populated, ched-p-workflows.ts:520,792,1000). No phone-format validation exercised in trace or test — remains a gap.

navigation.evidence: ched-p-workflows.ts:519-525 and ched-p-accessibility-tests.spec.ts:240-249 both sequence Contact Details Page -> Nominated Contacts Page -> Contact Address Page. Corroborates the trace-derived openQuestion that Save and continue navigates to nominated-contact.

openQuestions: None of the three inputs carry an HTML required attribute (required=false in the DOM), yet they are core contact details pre-populated from the account. The QA tests confirm this is treated as accept-the-defaults: every ched-p journey clicks Save and continue without touching the fields, and none assert any required/format rule. So server-side required/format (email, phone) rules are unverified by BOTH sources — a genuine gap. Mine an error-state trace to capture the messages, or confirm with a human.

This page is the 'responsible-person/contact-details' variant (returnUrl and hint id both carry the 'responsible-person-contact-details' prefix); after 'Save and continue' the journey navigates to '/nominated-contact'. The QA workflows confirm the sequence Contact Details -> Nominated Contacts -> Contact Address. Confirm whether the new IUU service needs both a responsible-person contact page and a separate nominated-contact page, or can collapse them.

The Name, Email address and Mobile number inputs were pre-filled from the signed-in user (Michael Scott) and the QA tests never edit them. Confirm whether these are editable free-text on every visit or read-only confirmations of account data.

Both submit buttons render with identical primary govuk-button styling — 'Save and return to hub' is not visually a secondary button. Confirm intended visual treatment for the rebuild (GOV.UK convention would make the return-to-hub action a secondary button or link).

VARIANT the trace missed: the page object exposes a 'Save and review' primary button (ContactDetailsPage.ts:14) used when the page is entered from the review screen (amend flow, ched-p-workflows.ts:1336,1344) — it replaces 'Save and continue'. The happy-path create trace only rendered 'Save and continue'. Confirm whether the IUU rebuild needs the same review/amend entry variant (return-to-review after editing an answer).

VARIANT the trace missed: the page object references an organisation-address review table (#review-table-organisation-address) with a 'Change' link (ContactDetailsPage.ts:6-8), and the amend workflow reaches it via reviewNotification.linkAddContactAddress -> contactDetails.linkChangeContactAddress (ched-p-workflows.ts:1342-1344). This organisation/contact-address block on the contact-details page was never rendered in our IUU trace. Confirm whether the IUU contact-details page also surfaces an organisation address section (and its Change action), or whether contact address is a wholly separate page in the rebuild.

DISCREPANCY: the QA page object drives this page only via 'Save and continue' / 'Save and review' and never references a 'Save and return to hub' button, whereas the trace rendered 'Save and return to hub' + 'Save and continue' + a 'Cancel and return to hub' link. The two button sets are journey-variant (create-with-hub vs amend-from-review). Kept the trace values (confirmed) and recorded the amend variant as inferred; confirm the full button matrix per entry point with a human.
